positioning: structured guided protocol, not a loose supplement
appetite regulation + eating behavior correction + digestion/gut-comfort support
NOT a standalone fat-burner claim product
promise_claims: 3 to 5 kg weight loss in 15 days when protocol is followed
eligibility: users with cravings, inconsistency, emotional eating
users with low energy, slow progress
patients with PCOD/PCOS, thyroid imbalance, high BP, fatty liver, diabetes, IBS, menopause-related weight gain (not a cure claim)
caution_conditions: multiple psychiatric-medication cases require doctor review
patients on anxiety medications may lose 2-4 kg in 15 days (reduced rate)
protocol_morning: OK Liquid on empty stomach immediately upon waking
zero-calorie drinks allowed (tea, coffee, lemon water, jeera water)
take any regular medications as usual
OK Liquid provides approximately 350-400 kcal nutrition support
protocol_night: OK Powder + OK Tablet taken together ~15 minutes before bed
maintain at least 2-hour gap between dinner and bedtime
1/2 teaspoon powder + 1 tablet with warm water
dried amla after liquid for taste balance
fasting_rules: no fixed meal timing — eat ONLY when truly hungry
most users take 1-1.5 meals per day
walk 5000-7000 steps daily (pranayam if walking not possible)
allowed_items: millets or oats (up to 30g/day uncooked, if hungry after other foods)
ghee or oil for cooking vegetables
restricted_items: simple carbohydrates: rice, wheat chapati, dal
Good Bug or similar gut health products
mechanism_allowed_claims: can support more stable daily energy
can make a simpler routine easier to follow
supports weight-loss efforts by making adherence easier
mechanism_disallowed_claims: no separate meal prep as center of positioning
safety_internal_handling: first 3 days can be an adjustment phase
first 3 days most crucial for the course
sluggishness in first days is short-lived
headaches may occur if daily beverage frequency changes
pricing: 30-day kit: INR 10,000 (INR 1,600 already applied as discount)
guarantee: if weight loss does not start within first 7 days, full refund applies
requires daily tracker sharing in provided format
requires course followed as prescribed per booklet
remaining course to be returned for refund processing
pick-up charges deducted from refund amount
continuation: can continue until target weight or BMI 25 is reached
after every 30 days, take 7-10 day break before next course
purpose of break: allow body to accept reduced weight as new normal
technically course can be taken below BMI 25 but weight-loss positioning should not apply below that point
other benefits like detoxification may still exist below BMI 25
maintenance: maintain caloric balance — eat as per BMR (1200-1400 kcal female, 1400-1600 kcal male)
macro order priority: protein -> fiber -> fats -> carbs
avoid fried and oily food for 7 days post course
eat fruit for breakfast, salad before lunch and dinner
heavy lunch, light dinner before 7 PM
limit outside food to once a week
Arogyam maintenance kit available if needed for extra help
stopping kit does not by itself cause weight regain
proof_points: named testimonials with specific losses: 5.2 kg, 4.6 kg, 5.3 kg in 15 days
founder Dr. Arun Tyagi — 34 years experience, BAMS + M.D. (Kaya Chikitsa)
founder of Arogyam Ayurvedic Panchakarma Hospital (est. 2013, Jodhpur)
messaging_guardrails: no sharing of patient before/after images publicly (government regulation)
not for users below 18 years of age
do not rely on older ingredient counts such as 39 herbs in internal training material
